50.$description: MIDAS blue 50, the lightest blue for subtle chrome and backgrounds.

100.$description: MIDAS blue 100 for light selections and low-emphasis blue surfaces.

200.$description: MIDAS blue 200 for pale brand accents.

300.$description: MIDAS blue 300 for medium-light brand accents.

400.$description: MIDAS blue 400 for focus rings and accessible accents.

500.$description: MIDAS blue 500 for primary brand colour.

600.$description: MIDAS blue 600 for light-mode primary actions and links.

700.$description: MIDAS blue 700 for light-mode primary hover states.

800.$description: MIDAS blue 800 for light-mode active states and deep chrome.

900.$description: MIDAS blue 900 for the deepest brand navy.

100.$description: MIDAS teal 100 for pale secondary accents.

400.$description: MIDAS teal 400 for dark-mode secondary actions.

500.$description: MIDAS teal 500 for light-mode secondary actions.

600.$description: MIDAS teal 600 for secondary hover states.

0.$description: White neutral for surfaces and inverse text.

50.$description: Cool grey 50 for light-mode page backgrounds.

100.$description: Cool grey 100 for alternate light-mode surfaces.

200.$description: Cool grey 200 for decorative hairlines and gridlines.

300.$description: Cool grey 300 for low-emphasis axes and separators.

400.$description: Cool grey 400 for disabled or subdued UI.

450.$description: Muted text grey tuned to clear AA on grey 50.

500.$description: Cool grey 500 for neutral chart and fallback colour.

600.$description: Cool grey 600 for strong muted neutral elements.

700.$description: Cool grey 700 for dark neutral UI.

900.$description: Cool grey 900 for primary light-mode text.

danger.$description: Semantic danger colour. Red appears only in semantic danger roles.

danger-bg.$description: Light danger background for alerts and validation.

danger-text.$description: Danger text colour that contrasts with danger background.

warning-bg.$description: Light warning background for status panels.

warning-text.$description: Warning text colour that contrasts with warning background.

success-bg.$description: Light success background for positive states.

success-text.$description: Success text colour that contrasts with success background.

info.$description: Semantic info colour aligned to MIDAS blue.

info-bg.$description: Light info background for informational panels.

info-text.$description: Info text colour that contrasts with info background.

1.$description: Categorical slot 1. Assign categorical colours by entity, never rank.

2.$description: Categorical slot 2. Assign categorical colours by entity, never rank.

3.$description: Categorical slot 3. Assign categorical colours by entity, never rank.

4.$description: Categorical slot 4. Assign categorical colours by entity, never rank.

5.$description: Categorical slot 5. Assign categorical colours by entity, never rank.

6.$description: Categorical slot 6. Assign categorical colours by entity, never rank.

7.$description: Categorical slot 7. Assign categorical colours by entity, never rank.

8.$description: Categorical slot 8. Assign categorical colours by entity, never rank.

9.$description: Categorical slot 9. Assign categorical colours by entity, never rank.

10.$description: Categorical slot 10. Assign categorical colours by entity, never rank.

other.$description: Categorical fallback. Past slot 10, fold the tail into cat-other.

3.$description: Diverging ramp step 3, light orange side.

4.$description: Diverging ramp neutral midpoint; never a hue.

5.$description: Diverging ramp step 5, light blue side.
